memoryArtifacts.headline: Châteauneuf de Randon D'or à trois pals d'azur et un chef de gueules plein.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I於大約1155年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆洛艾a奧-德-藍登時，他的父親Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II26歲，母親Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX37歲。他於1180年與Alix d’Apchier結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1185年在他的家鄉享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I于大约1155年出生在法国藍多-盧希隆洛艾a奧-德-藍登时，他的父亲Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II26岁，母亲Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX37岁。他于1180年与Alix d’Apchier结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1185年在他的家乡享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guerin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Andre, Dominique, Aime, Alain, Arsene, Benoit, Francois, Gilles.

French (Guérin) and Irish (of French Huguenot origin): from the ancient Germanic personal name Warino, Latinized as Guarinus, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France, partly as a result of the popularity of the Carolingian lay Guérin de Montglave. This was the name of several Huguenot families who came to England as refugees at different times in the 16th and 17th centuries. The surname became established as a surname in Ireland (County Limerick) as early as the 16th century. Compare Garin , Garing , Gearing , Geren , Geron , Gerren , Geurin , Guerrant , and Ward .
Italian (Friuli Venezia Giulia): variant of   Guerino  .

variants.name: Guerrant
meanings: In some cases possibly also French (Seine-Maritime): variant of Guerrand, a nickname for a belligerent person or alternatively for a valiant soldier, derived from guerrer ‘to fight’. The surname Guerrant is very rare in France.

History: Daniel Guérin/Guerrant from Saint-Nazaire-sur-Charente in Charente-Maritime, France, married Marie L'Orange in Saint-Nazaire in 1697, died in Goochland, VA, in 1721. His name is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Gearing
meanings: English (Sussex and London): perhaps a nickname from Middle English gering, apparently with the sense ‘lecher; glutton’.
English (of French Huguenot origin): Anglicized form of French Guérin (see Guerin ).
Americanized form of German   Gehring   or of some other similar (like-sounding) German surname (compare e.g.   Gahring   and   Garing  ).

variants.name: Geren
meanings: Shortened form of the biblical name Keren-happuch, borne by the third of Job's daughters (Job 42:14). The name meant ‘horn of eye-paint’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Garin
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant of   Darren  , associated with the singer  Bobby Darin  (  1936–73 ), who was originally called  Walden Robert Cassotto . He chose the name that he made famous from the list of surnames in a telephone directory.

en.lifeSummary: When Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I was born about 1155, in Châteauneuf-de-Randon, Lozère, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II, was 26 and his mother, Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX, was 37. He married Alix d’Apchier in 1180. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1185, in his hometown, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I est né environ 1155, à Châteauneuf-de-Randon, Lozère, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Alix d’Apchier en 1180. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1185, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I um 1155 in Châteauneuf-de-Randon, Lozère, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II 26 und seine Mutter Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX 37. Er hat 1180 Alix d’Apchier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1185 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I è nato il circa 1155 nel Châteauneuf-de-Randon, Lozère, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Alix d’Apchier nel 1180. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1185, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon Iが約1155年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンロズeアチaテアウネウフ-デ-ランドンで生まれた時，父Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON IIは26歳，母Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUXは37歳であった。1180年にAlix d’Apchierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1185年に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I(이)가 대략 1155년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 로즈e르 cha테오니우프-데-랜던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1180년 Alix d’Apchier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1185년 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Châteauneuf-de-Randon, Lozère, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix d’Apchier em 1180. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1185, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I родился около 1155 г. в местности чaтонеуф-де-рандон, лозeр, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix d’Apchier в 1180 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1185 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guerin de Châteauneuf-de-Randon I nació aproximadamente 1155, en Châteauneuf-de-Randon, Lozère, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Guillaume DE CHATEAUNEUF-RANDON II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Marquèze DU MAS DE GROSFAUX, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Alix d’Apchier en 1180. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1185, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años.
